items.summary: Organize PyData STL, a local chapter of the global PyData community, hosting events and talks on data science and machine learning topics.

Research Topic: Computational Investigation of Phosphorylation Effects on Prospero using Advanced Sampling Techniques
Collaborated on designing, developing, and deploying web applications.
Using Python Django to create a Lean based QMS system Using Selenium tools for Functional Testing
